'''bozhataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jubious|jubious]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jubious|jubious]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bozhataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhatithi|bozhatithi]] || [[word:bozhatiji|bozhatiji]] || [[word:bozhatishi|bozhatishi]] || [[word:bozhatiki|bozhatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhatuthuthu|bozhatuthuthu]] || [[word:bozhatujuju|bozhatujuju]] || [[word:bozhatushushu|bozhatushushu]] || [[word:bozhatukuku|bozhatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhatuthu|bozhatuthu]] || [[word:bozhatuju|bozhatuju]] || [[word:bozhatushu|bozhatushu]] || [[word:bozhatuku|bozhatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhatufthuf|bozhatufthuf]] || [[word:bozhatufjuf|bozhatufjuf]] || [[word:bozhatufshuf|bozhatufshuf]] || [[word:bozhatufkuf|bozhatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhatethe|bozhatethe]] || [[word:bozhateje|bozhateje]] || [[word:bozhateshe|bozhateshe]] || [[word:bozhateke|bozhateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhatothotho|bozhatothotho]] || [[word:bozhatojojo|bozhatojojo]] || [[word:bozhatoshosho|bozhatoshosho]] || [[word:bozhatokoko|bozhatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhatotho|bozhatotho]] || [[word:bozhatojo|bozhatojo]] || [[word:bozhatosho|bozhatosho]] || [[word:bozhatoko|bozhatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhatofthof|bozhatofthof]] || [[word:bozhatofjof|bozhatofjof]] || [[word:bozhatofshof|bozhatofshof]] || [[word:bozhatofkof|bozhatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhatïfthïf|bozhatïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfjïf|bozhatïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfshïf|bozhatïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfkïf|bozhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhatïfthïfthïf|bozhatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfjïfjïf|bozhatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfshïfshïf|bozhatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfkïfkïf|bozhatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhatïfthïf|bozhatïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfjïf|bozhatïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfshïf|bozhatïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfkïf|bozhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhatïfthïf|bozhatïfthïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfjïf|bozhatïfjïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfshïf|bozhatïfshïf]] || [[word:bozhatïfkïf|bozhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhatæthæ|bozhatæthæ]] || [[word:bozhatæjæ|bozhatæjæ]] || [[word:bozhatæshæ|bozhatæshæ]] || [[word:bozhatækæ|bozhatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhatathatha|bozhatathatha]] || [[word:bozhatajaja|bozhatajaja]] || [[word:bozhatashasha|bozhatashasha]] || [[word:bozhatakaka|bozhatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhatatha|bozhatatha]] || [[word:bozhataja|bozhataja]] || [[word:bozhatasha|bozhatasha]] || [[word:bozhataka|bozhataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhatafthaf|bozhatafthaf]] || [[word:bozhatafjaf|bozhatafjaf]] || [[word:bozhatafshaf|bozhatafshaf]] || [[word:bozhatafkaf|bozhatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bozhatasha|bozhatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhatshësha|bozhatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhatrosha|bozhatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhatmusha|bozhatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhatyasha|bozhatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhatnkshësha|gobozhatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhatnkrosha|gobozhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhatnkmusha|gobozhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhatnkyasha|gobozhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bozhazhatasha|bozhazhatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhazhatshësha|bozhazhatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhazhatrosha|bozhazhatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhazhatmusha|bozhazhatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhazhatyasha|bozhazhatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhazhatnkshësha|gobozhazhatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhazhatnkrosha|gobozhazhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhazhatnkmusha|gobozhazhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhazhatnkyasha|gobozhazhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bezhætasha|bezhætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bezhætshësha|bezhætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bezhætrosha|bezhætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bezhætmusha|bezhætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bezhætyasha|bezhætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobezhætnkshësha|gobezhætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobezhætnkrosha|gobezhætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobezhætnkmusha|gobezhætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobezhætnkyasha|gobezhætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bozhfatasha|bozhfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhfatshësha|bozhfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhfatrosha|bozhfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhfatmusha|bozhfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhfatyasha|bozhfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhfatnkshësha|gobozhfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhfatnkrosha|gobozhfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhfatnkmusha|gobozhfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhfatnkyasha|gobozhfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
